name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Admin Privileges Added (Unix)
notes: This rule detects admin privileges added to standard users. An adversary may escalate its privileges for further attacks.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Admin Privileges Added (Unix) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Group Member Add Success
when the event matches Application (custom) is any of usermod
when the event matches Group Name (custom) is any of sudo
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Admin Privileges Added (Unix) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Operating System
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Group Member Add Success
AND when the event matches Application (custom) is any of usermod
AND when the event matches Group Name (custom) is any of sudo
